+      {
+        "title": "Check current vllm setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vllm version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vllm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vllm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vllm configuration:\nIt would be highly beneficial if the library could incorporate support for Grammar and GBNF files.\nhttps://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/grammars/README.md"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for grammar",
+        "description": "Hi! Sorry for the delay. I ended up implementing a minor speedup for constrained generation on llama.cpp by skipping \"obvious\" tokens and just decoding the ones that _need_ an LLM. Although it managed to reach around double the original decoding performance, it is still not enough for my use case, so I will likely revisit this approach with vLLM in the future. \nIt is not the current priority for my personal project though, so it may take some weeks before I start experimenting again. \n\nIf\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",

+      }
+    ],

I ended up implementing a minor speedup for constrained generation on llama.cpp by skipping \"obvious\" tokens and just decoding the ones that _need_ an LLM.
